message:
fix(codegen): Escape Zig keywords in variable declarations across all code paths

Previously, variables named after Zig keywords (like `fn`, `test`, `const`) were
not properly escaped in several code paths, causing compilation errors like
`var fn: runtime.PyValue = undefined;` instead of `var @"fn": runtime.PyValue`.

Fixed keyword escaping in:
- misc.zig: hoistVarWithExpr, hoistVarWithExprDirect, tuple iteration, context managers
- conditionals.zig: walrus operator declarations, if statement hoisting
- function_gen.zig: forward-declared captures for functions and methods

Also includes related fixes:
- signature.zig: Fallback to ?runtime.PyValue when type inference fails for defaults
- Support stubs and tuple ops improvements
